name: useObject
description: Hook that provides state and helper methods to manage an object
examples: const { value, set, reset, remove, update, merge, clear, toggle, has, keys, isEmpty, size } = useObject({ name: 'John', age: 30, isActive: true });

returns.name: An
returns.description: object containing the current state and functions to interact with the object

source.source: * @returns {UseObjectReturn<Value>} An object containing the current state and functions to interact with the object

tokens.name: An
tokens.description: object containing the current state and functions to interact with the object
